# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources

  serverName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging-sqlserver
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Server

  databaseName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging-appdb
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure SQL Database

  adminLogin:
    type: string
    defaultValue: sqladmin
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator login

  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    defaultValue: "AzureSQL2024!"
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server administrator password

  skuName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: S1
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - S0
      - S1
      - S2
      - S3
      - P1
      - P2
    metadata:
      description: SKU name for the database

  skuTier:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Standard
    allowedValues:
      - Basic
      - Standard
      - Premium
    metadata:
      description: SKU tier for the database

  maxSizeBytes:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 268435456000
    metadata:
      description: Maximum size of the database in bytes (default 250GB)

  devIpAddress1:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 203.0.113.10
    metadata:
      description: Development team IP address 1

  devIpAddress2:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 203.0.113.20
    metadata:
      description: Development team IP address 2

  devIpRangeStart:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 198.51.100.0
    metadata:
      description: Development office IP range start

  devIpRangeEnd:
    type: string
    defaultValue: 198.51.100.255
    metadata:
      description: Development office IP range end

  environment:
    type: string
    defaultValue: staging
    allowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - production
    metadata:
      description: Environment name

variables:
  serverFullName: "[concat(parameters('serverName'), '-', parameters('environment'), '-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
  databaseFullName: "[concat(parameters('databaseName'), '-', parameters('environment'))]"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[variables('serverFullName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: development-testing
      managedBy: devops
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('adminLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Enabled

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverFullName'), '/', variables('databaseFullName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverFullName'))]"
    tags:
      environment: "[parameters('environment')]"
      purpose: development-testing
      managedBy: devops
    sku:
      name: "[parameters('skuName')]"
      tier: "[parameters('skuTier')]"
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: "[parameters('maxSizeBytes')]"
      zoneRedundant: false
      readScale: Disabled
      requestedBackupStorageRedundancy: Local

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverFullName'), '/AllowAllAzureServices')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverFullName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: 0.0.0.0
      endIpAddress: 0.0.0.0

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverFullName'), '/DevIP1')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverFullName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddress1')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddress1')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverFullName'), '/DevIP2')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverFullName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddress2')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpAddress2')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverFullName'), '/DevOfficeIPRange')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverFullName'))]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpRangeStart')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIpRangeEnd')]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/connectionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverFullName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverFullName'))]"
    properties:
      connectionType: Default

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/transparentDataEncryption
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverFullName'), '/', variables('databaseFullName'), '/current')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('serverFullName'), variables('databaseFullName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/auditingSettings
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverFullName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverFullName'))]"
    properties:
      state: Enabled
      retentionDays: 30
      isAzureMonitorTargetEnabled: true

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/backupShortTermRetentionPolicies
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(variables('serverFullName'), '/', variables('databaseFullName'), '/default')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('serverFullName'), variables('databaseFullName'))]"
    properties:
      retentionDays: 14
      diffBackupIntervalInHours: 12

outputs:
  sqlServerFqdn:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverFullName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"

  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('serverFullName')]"

  databaseName:
    type: string
    value: "[variables('databaseFullName')]"

  connectionString:
    type: string
    value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('serverFullName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName, ',1433;Initial Catalog=', variables('databaseFullName'), ';Persist Security Info=False;User ID=', parameters('adminLogin'), ';Password=', parameters('adminPassword'), ';MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;')]"

  resourceId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('serverFullName'), variables('databaseFullName'))]"
